headline: Bank of England holds rates as Middle East conflict forces inflation rethink
summary: The Bank of England held interest rates at 3.75% on Thursday after voting unanimously to sit tight as surging energy prices driven by the Middle East conflict pushed the UK inflation outlook sharply higher. The Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) warned that consumer price inflation could rise...

headline: Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% amid Iran conflict
summary: Markets are fully pricing in a quarter-point interest rate increase by July to 4%

raw.headline: Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% amid Iran conflict
raw.summary: Markets are fully pricing in a quarter-point interest rate increase by July to 4%

headline: Bank of England holds interest rates over Iran war inflation threat
summary: The Bank of England has kept interest rates on hold at 3.75pc as it braces for an inflation shock triggered by the war in Iran.

raw.headline: Bank of England holds interest rates over Iran war inflation threat
raw.summary: The Bank of England has kept interest rates on hold at 3.75pc as it braces for an inflation shock triggered by the war in Iran.

headline: Gas prices surge more than 20% after Iran targets Qatar production
summary: Wholesale gas prices surged this morning after strikes on Qatar’s main production facility.  In early trading in London the April futures contract for natural gas was up 21.7% at 169.7p a therm, although it had spiked higher at 178p a therm earlier.  Meanwhile the price of oil also surged, with a benchmark barrel of Brent Crude up nearly 6% at $113.1.

headline: 2-year Treasury yield jumps as fear of rising inflation weighs on sentiment
summary: The 2-year Treasury yield rose on Thursday after new labor market data and as inflation fears linked to the U.S.-Iran war continued to sour sentiment.
